title: Visibility-decline trend report — score dropped 15 pts (-23.8%)
html:
A visibility-tracker trend report (likely peekaboo or InsightsAI) showing a tracked site's AI-presence score dropping from 63 → 48 (−15 pts, −23.8%) across Nov 17–18, with auto-prescribed next steps (audit recent changes, check competitors, run high-priority Action Plan items). Confirms the visibility-tracking-as-monthly-report value prop the aeo agency sells.

peekaboo · insight ai · aeo agency · ai search optimization · ai visibility engine
